circulationTemplates.name: MRC U Foil (Powercell B, Atmos Shield, Ominous Shadow)

editions.effect:
**Brew** — One Springleaf

[Class Bonus] At the beginning of your recollection phase, put an **age** counter on CARDNAME.

**Sacrifice CARDNAME:** Draw a card. Then if there were three or more **age** counters on CARDNAME, draw an additional card.
editions.effect_raw:
Brew — One Springleaf

[Class Bonus] At the beginning of your recollection phase, put an age counter on Aqua Vitae.

Sacrifice Aqua Vitae: Draw a card. Then if there were three or more age counters on Aqua Vitae, draw an additional card.
